title: Project Manager – Automotive Powertrain Development (Munich, Germany)
description_raw:
Jonathan Lee Recruitment are working with a Tier-1 automotive supplier to find a Project Manager to lead powertrain component development programmes at their Munich R&D centre.

The role focuses on mechanical design and validation of next-generation ICE/hybrid powertrain components — specifically high-pressure fuel injection systems and allied mechanical ancillaries. The programme is subject to VDA FMEA methodology and German IATF 16949 quality standards.

Scope:
- Manage development programme from concept proposal through DVP&R sign-off to SOP release
- Chair weekly gate reviews with the OEM Tier-1 customer
- Manage a team of 8 development engineers based in Munich
- Administer milestone-based development contracts with subcontract testing facilities

Candidate profile:
- Mechanical engineering degree
- 6+ years in automotive powertrain development PM
- VDA 4/IATF 16949 familiarity
- Business German (B2 or above) advantageous but not mandatory
- EU citizenship or valid EU work entitlement required

Rate: €650 per day (German self-employed or German Contracting GmbH entity — no UK-based PSC)
Duration: 12 months
Start: 7 September 2026
Location: Munich, Bavaria — on-site; no remote option available
